name: pseudo-server
author: z-Eduard005
description: A decentralized Minecraft server provisioning program. No dedicated host required — first to run becomes host, others auto-join.

scripts.pkg-handle: pkg build/main.js -o build/Pseudo-Server.exe -t node18-win-x64 && pkg build/main.js -o build/Pseudo-Server -t node18-linux-x64 && chmod +x build/Pseudo-Server
scripts.build: npm run ts-handle && npm run pkg-handle && npm run bump-version
